videos.headline: Chattanooga intercepts the pass in Jacksonville State territory
videos.description: Jacksonville State QB Bryant Horn's pass is intercepted by Kareem Orr.

videos.headline: Chattanooga QB beats the blitz for big gain
videos.description: Nick Tiano beats the pressure and throws it up to Joseph Parker, who goes up and catches it.

videos.headline: Chattanooga defense forces an INT to close the  half
videos.description: Lucas Webb gets the interception to stop the Jacksoville State offense before halftime.

videos.headline: Jacksonville State's defense gets the pick-6
videos.description: Jonathan Hagler makes the interception and returns it all the way for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Jacksonville State WR burns defense for long TD
videos.description: Shaq Davidson uses the great double move and scores a 59-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Jacksonville State's defense gets interception off the deflection
videos.description: Chattanooga's offense continues to struggle as Reggie Hall lays out and makes the diving interception.

videos.headline: Chattanooga Head Coach wants his team to clean up the mistakes for the second half
videos.description: Tom Arth not happy with all the mistakes his team made in the first half, down 10-6.

videos.headline: Roc Thomas, Darius Jackson lead Gamecocks to victory
videos.description: Ahmad Brooks and Anish Shroff break down the big performances by Roc Thomas and Darius  Jackson as Jacksonville State wins 27-13.
